name: typescript-comprehensive-guide
author: Vasyl Krupka
description: A deep, interactive, bilingual (EN/UA) guide to TypeScript — the type system, type-level programming, applied patterns, and the compiler.

scripts.verify: npm run gen:meta && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run check:data && npm run test && npm run smoke && npm run build

//test+smoke: standard §4.6. `test` auto-discovers scripts/test-*.ts (run-tests.ts) — green when none exist yet; add a pure engine in src/lib + scripts/test-<name>.ts and it's picked up. `smoke` SSR-renders every sim/figure/page (scripts/smoke.ts) — wire its 4 TODO spots after the golden module. Both run only meaningfully once the golden module exists; run `verify` from then on.
//meta-split: DONE (S5, standard §4.4). scripts/genMeta.ts derives src/data/meta.json (slim nav/search index) from concepts.ts; scripts/checkMeta.ts guards drift and is chained into `typecheck`; gen:meta runs on predev/prebuild. The eager shell (TopBar, Sidebar, Footer, LandscapeMap, search) imports src/data/meta.ts; only the lazy ModulePage imports full bodies from concepts.ts, keeping module content out of the initial bundle.
